reason: Check backend implementation against Docker runtime ownership and checklist
Check Docker config persistence, normalization, masking, and manualPassport contracts
Check route errors and centralized credential recovery behavior
Check that logs do not expose raw cookies, QR codes, LTP0, or tickets
Check quality gate, tests, and forbidden backend patterns
Check WebUI changes against Vue/Vite ownership
Check QR login UI component structure
Check QR polling, partial success, and retryable state handling
Check frontend lint, accessibility, and quality expectations
Check cross-layer data flow across core, routes, config, and WebUI
Check implementation against existing cookie authority and recovery constraints
Check QR login implementation against verified endpoint flow and secrecy constraints
Check full Yuba login implementation against verified passport-rooted SSO behavior
